calendar.matters: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted
Off Calendar Apr-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DEEMING THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS SPECIFIED IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSION AS ADMITTED

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Wells Fargo N.A.'s motion for a deemed-admitted order is granted as to the RFAs attached as Exhibit 1 to the Lopez Declaration. These RFAs were initially served while defendant Adan Baltazar was represented by counsel but Wells Fargo's moving papers show that plaintiff also served the discovery directly on the defendant on February 10, 2026 and no responses have been received.

Sanctions are mandatory in this instance. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2033.280, subd. (c).) The court orders Baltazar to pay $50 to plaintiff within 30 days.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2026 Set For Trial On Jul-27-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To Apr-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA'S Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted

Continued on the court's own motion to April 9, 2026. Wells Fargo shall serve an amended notice of motion and a copy of all moving papers on the pro per plaintiff at his address of record and shall file a proof of service with the court by 16 court days in advance of the continued hearing date.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
